demons.name: Abaddon
demons.strengths: Selects targets that cannot defend themselves, very deadly.
demons.weaknesses: Has a strong chance to ignore you during a hunt when holding a Crucifix

demons.name: Agash
demons.strengths: It moves much faster in cold environments.
demons.weaknesses: Its movement may slow down in a warmer environment.

demons.name: Boogey
demons.strengths: It will drain your sanity very quick if you use EMF, ESG and Spirit Box in its room.
demons.weaknesses: If there is a turned off light nearby, it will try to turn it on. Any lights nearby Boogey won't break.

demons.name: Demon
demons.strengths: If it decides to kill someone, it will be very hard to stop it.
demons.weaknesses: As long as you don´t make him angry, the Demon usually won´t hunt you.

demons.name: Deogen
demons.strengths: They will be much more aggressive when hunting their chosen target.
demons.weaknesses: Less aggressive if its prey is not nearby.

demons.name: Goryo
demons.strengths: Goryo does not interact with ESG if someone is nearby.
demons.weaknesses: We don't have any data.

demons.name: Guipo
demons.strengths: It can trigger fake hunts to deceive you. Fake hunts will drain your sanity quickly. When it gets bored of playing games, it will try to kill you.
demons.weaknesses: If it has decided to kill you its speed will decrease to normal. It will move fast in their fake hunts. If he's playing games with you, you're safe.

demons.name: Gul
demons.strengths: They can get angry and hunt if you swear.
demons.weaknesses: It will be calmer if you don´t Talk too much.

demons.name: Hantu
demons.strengths: Talking to you makes you easier prey for it.
demons.weaknesses: If it curses you by talking to you, you can remove the curse with Sanity Pills.

demons.name: Iblis
demons.strengths: If it decides to hunt, it may be impossible to escape as it knows your location
demons.weaknesses: It moves more slowly if it is close to its target

demons.name: Jinn
demons.strengths: Because it is a very active ghost, it is prone to hunting.
demons.weaknesses: Because it is very active, it reveals itself quickly.

demons.name: Mare
demons.strengths: Difficult to detect.
demons.weaknesses: If there are someone nearby, it will not want to hunt.

demons.name: Myling
demons.strengths: If there is no fire around it, it will be aggressive.
demons.weaknesses: If there is a fire around it, it will put it out first before hunting.

demons.name: Naamah
demons.strengths: With its slyness, it can steal the tools on the ground, even the tools you hold.
demons.weaknesses: If the lights are on, it will turn them off before stealing the tools. If the tools are in the Salt Barrier, it won't be able to steal them.

demons.name: Oni
demons.strengths: It is known to be very fast.
demons.weaknesses: No data.

demons.name: Onryo
demons.strengths: They will be much more aggressive if there are others with their chosen one.
demons.weaknesses: They will not harm the person they fall in love with.

demons.name: Poltergeist
demons.strengths: They can throw many things at once and can quickly lower your sanity.
demons.weaknesses: They will calm down when there is nothing left to throw.

demons.name: Raiju
demons.strengths: Lonely Targets are very good prey for them.
demons.weaknesses: Traveling in pack will make the Raiju more passive.

demons.name: Revenant
demons.strengths: They´re a very unstable ghost, very unpredictable.
demons.weaknesses: If it decides to stay calm, it may make it easier for you to find it.

demons.name: Shade
demons.strengths: They're more aggressive in the dark.
demons.weaknesses: A brightly lit environment will weaken the Shade.

demons.name: Thaye
demons.strengths: A Thaye has been known to be much more aggressive and fast when they are young.
demons.weaknesses: A Thaye will move much slower and be less aggressive if they are older.

demons.name: Wraith
demons.strengths: Can teleport rooms and start hunting from anywhere inside the building
demons.weaknesses: It won't hunt while asleep. Talking to the Spirit Box, using the UV Light, and Candles will awaken it.

demons.name: Yokai
demons.strengths: It will be very active between 6-8, and 10-12 o'clock. It will hunt at least once between 8-10 o'clock.
demons.weaknesses: It will be calmer at hours other than 6-8 and 10-12. It will not react other than hunting between 8-10.

demons.name: Yurei
demons.strengths: You are more likely to be hunted when traveling in groups.
demons.weaknesses: It may weaken itself if alone.

tools.name: EMF
tools.desc: EMF is a device that detects electromagnetic waves left behind by paranormal activity.

tools.name: Thermometer
tools.desc: It is used to measure the temperature of the room where paranormal entities are located.

tools.name: Spirit Box
tools.desc: A tool that allows you to ask questions to a ghost.

tools.name: UV Light
tools.desc: UV Light, can show fingerprints of paranormal entities on objects they have interacted with.

tools.name: Easel Canvas
tools.desc: Paranormal entities can draw their images from the dimension they inhabit onto the canvas.

tools.name: ESG
tools.desc: ESG, raises the energy of paranormal entities to display the ghost itself on top of the device.

tools.name: Ectoplasma Glass
tools.desc: This glass allows you to see ectoplasms left behind by ghosts, and objects invisible to the naked eye.

tools.name: Candle
tools.desc: Candle provides light and helps maintain your sanity.

tools.name: Crucifix
tools.desc: Crucifix is a holy item that will protect you against ghost attacks.

tools.name: Salt Barrier
tools.desc: A sacred salt that provides group protection against ghost attacks. The more the ghost attacks, the lower the chance of protection will be.

tools.name: Sanity Pills
tools.desc: Sanity Pill can help you regain some of your sanity.

tools.name: Sledgehammer
tools.desc: A large, heavy hammer used for such jobs as breaking rocks.

tools.name: Photo Camera
tools.desc: You can take pictures with the Photo Camera.

tools.name: Tripod Camera
tools.desc: Tripod camera, can be placed in a location and monitored remotely.

tools.name: Flashlight
tools.desc: The flashlight helps you navigate in dark places.
